hooks.command: command -v wiki >/dev/null 2>&1 && [ -z "$(find "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/wikiforge" -name '*.py' -newer "$(command -v wiki)" -print -quit 2>/dev/null)" ] || uv tool install --force --reinstall --quiet "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}" >/dev/null 2>&1; true
hooks.statusMessage: wikiforge: ensuring the `wiki` CLI is installed (first run downloads dependencies — may take a few minutes)…
